basic_details.job_title: RITES Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Manager & Assistant Manager Posts
basic_details.organization_name: RITES Limited (A Govt. of India Enterprise)
basic_details.short_information: RITES Ltd. is recruiting dynamic professionals for Ecology & Environment roles on contractual basis.

application_fee.details: Application fee is ₹600/- + taxes. Candidates are advised to read the detailed notification before applying.

qualification.details: Manager - Ecology & Biodiversity (CP/12/26): | Master’s Degree in Life Sciences (Zoology / Botany / Forestry / Environmental Science / Ecology etc.) Minimum 04 years post-qualification experience in Ecology & Biodiversity | Assistant Manager - Environment (CL/07/26): | Bachelor’s Degree in Environmental Engineering OR Bachelor’s in Engineering + Master’s in Environmental Science/Engineering/Management Minimum 02 years post-qualification experience in Environment | Age Limit: Maximum 40 years as on 16.08.2026

salary_details.details: Manager: Pay Scale ₹50,000 – 1,60,000 Assistant Manager: Monthly Basic Pay ₹23,340 (indicative CTC ₹5,09,741)

selection_process: Selection will be based on Written Test (60%) + Interview (40%).
how_to_apply: 1. Before applying, candidates should ensure that they satisfy the necessary conditions and requirements of the position.

2. Interested candidates fulfilling the above laid down eligibility criteria are required to apply online in the registration format available in the Career Section of RITES website, http://www.rites.com.

3. While submitting the online application, the system would generate ‘Registration No.’ on top of online form filled up by the candidate. Note down this “Registration No.” and quote it for all further communication with RITES Ltd.

4. While filling up the required details, candidates are advised to carefully and correctly fill the details of “Identity Proof”. Candidates are also advised to note the same and ensure the availability of the same Identity Proof as it will be required to be produced in /original at later stages of selection (if called).
5. After filling up the required details under the “Fill/ Modify Application Form”, candidate must upload all documents under the “Upload Document” section.
important_instructions: Posts are on contractual basis initially for one year, extendable based on performance. Selected candidates can be posted anywhere in India. Reservation and relaxation as per Government of India rules. Only online applications will be accepted.

content_sections.heading: RITES Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Manager - Ecology & Biodiversity (CP/12/26): Master’s Degree in Life Sciences (Zoology / Botany / Forestry / Environmental Science / Ecology etc.) Minimum 04 years post-qualification experience in Ecology & Biodiversity Assistant Manager - Environment (CL/07/26): Bachelor’s Degree in Environmental Engineering OR Bachelor’s in Engineering + Master’s in Environmental Science/Engineering/Management Minimum 02 years post-qualification experience in Environment Age Limit: Maximum 40 years as on 16.08.2026

content_sections.heading: RITES Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be based on Written Test (60%) + Interview (40%).

content_sections.heading: RITES Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Manager: Pay Scale ₹50,000 – 1,60,000 Assistant Manager: Monthly Basic Pay ₹23,340 (indicative CTC ₹5,09,741)

content_sections.heading: RITES Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: Application fee is ₹600/- + taxes. Candidates are advised to read the detailed notification before applying.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for RITES Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: 1. Before applying, candidates should ensure that they satisfy the necessary conditions and requirements of the position. 2. Interested candidates fulfilling the above laid down eligibility criteria are required to apply online in the registration format available in the Career Section of RITES website, http://www.rites.com. 3. While submitting the online application, the system would generate ‘Registration No.’ on top of online form filled up by the candidate. Note down this “Registration No.” and quote it for all further communication with RITES Ltd. 4. While filling up the required details, candidates are advised to carefully and correctly fill the details of “Identity Proof”. Candidates are also advised to note the same and ensure the availability of the same Identity Proof as it will be required to be produced in /original at later stages of selection (if called). 5. After filling up the required details under the “Fill/ Modify Application Form”, candidate must upload all documents under the “Upload Document” section.

content_sections.heading: RITES Recruitment 2026 - Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Posts are on contractual basis initially for one year, extendable based on performance. Selected candidates can be posted anywhere in India. Reservation and relaxation as per Government of India rules. Only online applications will be accepted.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for RITES Limited Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for RITES Limited Recruitment 2026 is 16 August 2026. Candidates must also complete the application fee payment before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in RITES Limited Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: RITES Limited has announced 04 contractual vacancies, including 01 Manager (Ecology & Biodiversity) post and 03 Assistant Manager (Environment) posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for RITES Limited Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: For the Manager post, candidates must have a Master's Degree in Life Sciences, Forestry, Environmental Science, Ecology, or a related discipline. For the Assistant Manager post, candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree in Environmental Engineering or Bachelor's in Engineering with a Master's Degree in Environmental Science, Environmental Engineering, or Environmental Management.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for RITES Limited Manager and Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for both posts is 40 years as on 16 August 2026. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for RITES Limited Manager and Assistant Manager posts?
faq.answer: The Manager (Ecology & Biodiversity) post carries a pay scale of ₹50,000 – ₹1,60,000, while the Assistant Manager (Environment) post offers a basic pay of ₹23,340 per month with an indicative annual CTC of approximately ₹5.09 lakh.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for RITES Limited Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply online through the official RITES website by filling out the application form, uploading the required documents, and paying the prescribed application fee before the closing date.

faq.question: Q7. Are the RITES Limited Manager and Assistant Manager posts permanent?
faq.answer: No. These positions are purely contractual, initially for one year, and may be extended based on the candidate's performance and project requirements.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the RITES Limited Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF?
faq.answer: Candidates can download the RITES Limited Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF from the official RITES website. The notification contains complete details regarding vacancies, eligibility, salary, selection process, important dates, and the online application procedure.
